sourceOfTruth: config/environments/<stage>.json (dev|test|staging|prod) + common.json (base, merged under) + shared.json (cross-env sonar/sentry) (ADR-0072)

rotationReload: regenerate artifact from manifest; no live reload — consumers read .env at process start
v2Location: config/environments/ (manifests retained as sole SoT) + generated .env/ (kept gitignored/generated)
